name: Shark's Cove
tagline: One of the 12 best shore dives on Earth — and you don't need a tank.
parking: Free lot across the street (shared with Three Tables) — fills by 9am
hours: Open 24 hours (no gates; Pupukea Beach Park)
bestTime: Summer only (May–Sep) when North Shore is calm; arrive before 9am for parking
talkStory: SUMMER ONLY — winter waves make this deadly. Water shoes are essential for the rocky entry. No gear rental at the cove; rent in Haleiwa town before driving out. The deeper caves and lava tubes on the outer reef are incredible for experienced snorkelers. The tide pools to the right of the cove are great for exploring even without snorkel gear. Combine with Three Tables next door and lunch at the nearby food trucks.
